name: Talent Showcase
description: Short-form video highlighting an academy player's skills, technique, or standout moments from recent matches or training sessions.

highlight_description.example: Dribbling masterclass in the U-17 derby

guidelines: 15-30 second Reel/TikTok showcasing 3-5 skill clips with smooth transitions. Use trending audio for maximum reach. Lower third shows player name and position. Stat pop-ups can appear during key moments. Green accent distinguishes academy content. End with the academy badge and a 'follow for more' CTA. Vertical format optimized for mobile.
